meta.question: In this model, will the choreography always reach an end node? (Model ID: 2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc)
meta.finalAnswer:
Yes. For model ID 2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc, there is no StartEvent that fails to reach an EndEvent via the model’s outgoing SequenceFlow paths.

Example: the StartEvent “Wunsch nach neuem WIrkstoff” can reach the EndEvent “Auftrag beendet” (reachable end count = 1 for that start).
